name: exam-cram-assistant
description: Chrome study extension with visual lessons, focus controls, video learning, and a persistent learning journey.

scripts.build: npm run build:export && npm run build:documents && npm run build:journey
scripts.check: node --check popup.js && node --check server.js && node --check preview-server.js && node --check export-utils.js && node --check export.js && node --check focus-utils.js && node --check background.js && node --check journey-utils.js && node --check journey-worker-utils.js && node --check journey-tree-utils.js && node --check journey-page.js && node --check video-utils.js && node --check offscreen.js && node --check cheat-sheet-utils.js && node --check journey-tree-entry.js && node --check build-journey-tree.mjs && node --check export-vendor-entry.js && node --check build-export-vendor.mjs && node --check document-reader-utils.js && node --check document-frame-reader.js && node --check document-reader-vendor-entry.js && node --check pdf-worker-entry.js && node --check build-document-reader-vendor.mjs
